name: ldrs
when_to_use: 任何 pending/loading/skeleton 状态想要一个精致的 inline spinner 时用它,而非手搓 CSS 转圈——确定进度的顶部条用 nprogress,复杂矢量动画用 lottie-web(已在目录)。它只给已调好物理的加载动画元素;显隐与你的异步状态绑定仍由消费 AI 接。
why_valuable: AI 默认输出僵硬的通用 border-spinner;调好缓动、不 jank 的 SVG/CSS spinner 很琐碎。ldrs 以 40+ 打磨过的 loader 作为 tree-shakeable web component 交付,消费 AI 只需 register + 挂标签。

data_in.note: 选一个 loader 名(决定 register 出的 <l-*> 标签),再给它的视觉属性;color 吃 CSS 颜色,size/speed/stroke 吃数字。多词 loader 标签走 kebab,如 dotWave→l-dot-wave。

schema.spinner: string —— loader 名,如 ring/quantum/helix/orbit/trio/waveform/dotWave;对应 named export + <l-ring> 等标签
schema.color?: string —— CSS 颜色,默认 loader 自带(黑)
schema.speed?: number —— 动画周期秒,默认随 loader
schema.stroke?: number —— 描边宽 px(ring 等支持),默认随 loader
schema.bg-opacity?: number —— 轨道底色透明度 0..1(ring 类),默认随 loader

spec.note: 尺寸由 size 属性(px)决定,默认约 40;元素为 inline 级自撑,勿用 vh/百分比外壳强拉。

en.when_to_use: Use it whenever a pending/loading/skeleton state needs a polished inline spinner instead of a hand-rolled CSS rotation. For a determinate top progress bar, use nprogress; for complex vector animation, use lottie-web (already in the catalog). It supplies only a loader element with tuned physics; the consuming AI still binds visibility to async state.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults to a stiff generic border spinner, while tuning a smooth SVG/CSS spinner without jank is tedious. ldrs ships 40+ polished loaders as tree-shakeable web components, so consuming AI only needs to register and mount a tag.

data_in.note: Choose one loader name (which determines the registered <l-*> tag), then supply its visual attributes. color accepts a CSS color; size/speed/stroke accept numbers. Multiword loader tags use kebab-case, for example dotWave -> l-dot-wave.

schema.spinner: string -- loader name, such as ring/quantum/helix/orbit/trio/waveform/dotWave; maps to a named export and tags such as <l-ring>
schema.size?: number -- diameter in px; default about 40
schema.color?: string -- CSS color; defaults to the loader's own color (black)
schema.speed?: number -- animation period in seconds; default depends on the loader
schema.stroke?: number -- stroke width in px (supported by ring and similar loaders); default depends on the loader
schema.bg-opacity?: number -- track opacity 0..1 (ring-style loaders); default depends on the loader

spec.note: Size is controlled by the size attribute in px and defaults to about 40. The element is inline-level and self-sizing; do not force it through a vh or percentage wrapper.

example._why: 钉死本库以 spinner 名选 loader、以属性(非 props)配置。

uplink: 纯 display,无 uplink;加载态的显隐由消费 AI 依自身异步生命周期直接增删元素处理。

carriers.widget: supported:元素在自身 shadow 内渲染、零全局 CSS 注入,<l-*> 挂进宿主 shadowRoot 即可;仅共享全局 customElements 注册表(guarded)
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + custom element,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: API correct: +esm 导出各 loader 命名对象(Ge as bouncy … zt as ring … gt as quantum … At as trio … Mt as waveform)(F);index.d.ts 逐个 re-export 元素 default;elements/ring.d.ts default = { register:(name?)=>void, element: class extends Base };register→customElements.define(e,class extends u{}) 被 customElements.get(e) 守卫(grep),重复注册安全;Base attachShadow({mode:'open'}) —— 元素在自己的 shadow 内渲染。globalStyleInjection=no / globalDomMutation=no / globalEvents=no:grep 到 0 处 document.head、0 处 document.body append、0 处 window.* 赋值、0 处 window/document addEventListener。唯一全局面是共享 customElements 注册表条目(guarded)。
